entry.title: Newcomer to SAP
entry.content:
Hi!

I'm Ricardo from Mexico. I'm a project Manager, PMP and Scrum Master Certified and want to learn the Activate Methodology, and eventually become expert in this mater. Hope I can add much more to this community.

Cheers!

 

Ricardo Bolan, PMP

entry.title: Partner Benefits Catalog for SAP Partners
entry.content:
SAP’s partner ecosystem is built on a shared mission—to deliver customer success together. And to help our partners maximize the value of their collaboration with SAP, we’ve enhanced the SAP Partner Benefits Catalog, making it even easier to identify and access the services that matter most to your business.

What’s New? Personalized, Tier-Based Benefits

The SAP Partner Benefits Catalog is a central resource that showcases a broad range of benefits and fee based services available to partners across all strategic solutions and the customer value journey. With the latest enhancements, partners can now:

  • Filter benefits based on their PartnerEdge level (Silver, Gold, or Platinum)

  • View services that are exclusive to their current tier

This new experience brings greater transparency and personalization, allowing partners to quickly identify high-value services—from go-to-market support and enablement offerings to co-innovation and demand generation programs.

Why It Matters

The enhanced catalog is more than just a list—it’s a strategic tool that helps partners:

✅ Plan their benefit utilization more effectively
✅ Unlock hidden value based on their current partnership level
✅ Strategically grow their business with SAP support

Whether you’re looking to scale faster, improve customer engagement, or expand your SAP solution knowledge, the catalog provides clear, actionable insights tailored to your partner journey.

Get Started Today

Log in to the Partner Benefits Catalog and explore services available based on your PartnerEdge level, designed to support your growth—every step of the way.

entry.title: SAP Digital payments add-on on S4/HANA RISE PCE & Third party add-ons
entry.content:
Hello,

We are currently on ECC using embedded paymetric add-on for credit card processing. We are planning a brown field migration to S4 private cloud and want to understand if digital-payment add-on is a must if we are already using paymetric software. Any insights are appreciated.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to get quota values & its corresponding year and...
entry.content:
@kr_pavankumar 

Kindly adjust the below SQL to your business requirement to extract but below SQL statement will be providing an hint to connect various tables.

---- PLQU , Quota -------------------------
SELECT Q.NAME,
       Q.DESCRIPTION,
       POS.NAME,
       FV.VALUE
  FROM CS_QUOTA Q
       INNER JOIN CS_QUOTA_VARIABLES QV
          ON Q.QUOTASEQ = QV.QUOTASEQ
       INNER JOIN CS_PERIOD PER
          ON     PER.NAME = 'January 2019'
             AND QV.Effectivestartdate < Per.Enddate
             AND QV.Effectiveenddate >= Per.Enddate
       INNER JOIN CS_CALENDAR CAL
          ON     CAL.NAME = 'Main Monthly Calendar'
             AND CAL.REMOVEDATE = TO_DATE ('01/01/2200', 'DD/MM/YYYY')
             AND CAL.CALENDARSEQ = PER.CALENDARSEQ
       INNER JOIN CS_PERIODTYPE PT
          ON     PT.PERIODTYPESEQ = PER.PERIODTYPESEQ
             AND PT.REMOVEDATE = TO_DATE ('01/01/2200', 'DD/MM/YYYY')
             AND PT.NAME = 'month'
       INNER JOIN CS_VARIABLE VAR
          ON VAR.RULEELEMENTSEQ = QV.VARIABLESEQ
             AND (VAR.Effectivestartdate < Per.Enddate
                  AND VAR.Effectiveenddate >= Per.Enddate
                  OR     VAR.EFFECTIVEENDDATE > PER.STARTDATE
                     AND VAR.EFFECTIVEENDDATE <= PER.ENDDATE
                     AND VAR.ISLAST = 1)
       INNER JOIN Cs_Variableassignment Va
          ON     VAR.RULEELEMENTSEQ = Va.VARIABLESEQ
             AND QV.VARIABLESEQ = VA.VARIABLESEQ
             AND VA.Effectivestartdate < Per.Enddate
             AND VA.Effectiveenddate >= Per.Enddate
       INNER JOIN Cs_fixedvalue fv
          ON fv.Ruleelementseq = Va.Assignmentseq AND fv.modelseq = 0
             AND (FV.Effectivestartdate < Per.Enddate
                  AND FV.Effectiveenddate >= Per.Enddate
                  OR     FV.EFFECTIVEENDDATE > PER.STARTDATE
                     AND FV.EFFECTIVEENDDATE <= PER.ENDDATE
                     AND FV.ISLAST = 1)
             AND FV.PERIODTYPESEQ = PT.PERIODTYPESEQ
       INNER JOIN CS_POSITION POS
          ON Va.Ruleelementownerseq = Pos.Ruleelementownerseq
             AND (POS.Effectivestartdate < Per.Enddate
                  AND POS.Effectiveenddate >= Per.Enddate
                  OR     POS.EFFECTIVEENDDATE > PER.STARTDATE
                     AND POS.EFFECTIVEENDDATE <= PER.ENDDATE
                     AND POS.ISLAST = 1)
 WHERE     Q.REMOVEDATE = TO_DATE ('01/01/2200', 'DD/MM/YYYY')
       AND QV.REMOVEDATE = TO_DATE ('01/01/2200', 'DD/MM/YYYY')
       AND VAR.REMOVEDATE = TO_DATE ('01/01/2200', 'DD/MM/YYYY')
       AND VA.REMOVEDATE = TO_DATE ('01/01/2200', 'DD/MM/YYYY')
       AND FV.REMOVEDATE = TO_DATE ('01/01/2200', 'DD/MM/YYYY')
       AND POS.REMOVEDATE = TO_DATE ('01/01/2200', 'DD/MM/YYYY')
       AND PER.REMOVEDATE = TO_DATE ('01/01/2200', 'DD/MM/YYYY')
       AND Q.NAME = 'QUOTANAME'
       AND POS.NAME = 'POSITIONNAMEHERE';

entry.title: CDS View Required for Total Shelf Life and Minimum Remaining Shelf Life in S/4HANA Cloud ?
entry.content:
CDS View Required for Total Shelf Life and Minimum Remaining Shelf Life.

Please help us to find Total Shelf Life and Minimum Remaining Shelf Life in CDS view.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: CDS View Required for Total Shelf Life and Minimum Re...
entry.content: Please use the CDS view I_ProductStorage_2 ( https://api.sap.com/cdsviews/I_PRODUCTSTORAGE_2 )

entry.title: CoA is not printing automatically after Post Goods issue for delivery.
entry.content: CoA is not printing automatically after Post Goods issue for delivery. User want to print the COA just after PGI.

entry.title: Supplier Invoice approval workflow - Invoice currency
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts,

we have requirement from customer to setup Supplier Invoice approval workflow. The threshold invoice amounts are given in group currency, but in workflow step condition, we have only option to select company code currency. Is there any option to have threshold amounts also in group currency?

Can you please advise?

Thank you!

Best regards,

Gohar

entry.title: Re: Python code error in dataflow
entry.content:
Hi, Below code worked for me

def transform(data):

specific_name = ['Male']

nv = data['gender'].isin(specific_name)

df= data[nv]

return df

Kind regards

Hari

NR path

entry.title: Settlement from WBS to cost center of the expenses only
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I have WBS with expenses and incomes. 

I want to settle only the expenses.

How may I do it?

For example, WBS I/9007-10

expenses: 6100.94

revenue: -6000

I know the GL/Cost Elements of the incomes. 

When I try to settle it as is, it says (as there are revenues):

I want the system to settle only the 6100.94 (expenses).

Thanks,

Noy

entry.title: Re: How to do background scheduling with clean core, including Fiori apps, replacing se38 reports
entry.content:
Hello @mlauber 

The fact that you had to use "additional save" to code for an action, is one of the reasons why RAP is counter-intuitive.

I really hope, the SAP brains behind the RAP designs and its restrictions, see this blog and understand the restrictions in RAP behavior forces people to invent workarounds, which makes the code almost unreadable. I had seen another blog, where someone used determination as a workaround for similar restrictions. 

I hope SAP releases some special new action type (similar to static, factory etc) in the future, that allows to do perform the stuff like DB Insert, that are currently restricted by action.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Mastering Complex SBPA Approvals : A Deep Dive into Wait Steps, Script Tasks, and API Integratio
entry.content:
@mohit_bansal3 

Thank you for sharing detailed steps for achieving a parallel approval process. I had thought that a Branch step could be used for this purpose. Is there any reason that Branch cannot be used? One thing I can think of is that in your use case, the number of approvers cannot be determined upfront. In such a case, this approach should be useful.

entry.title: Re: Key User Custom Fields in SAP S/4HANA SAP GUI UIs: How to control field properties (mandatory,..
entry.content:
One suggestion: There should be a huge disclaimer on top of these kind of blogs saying, the functionality is only available for the handful of business objects where corresponding BADI exists. Else, readers are misdirected to think that this is a feature widely available for every BO.

Thanks

entry.title: Modifying RFPOSXEXT Structure Fields in FBL3N Using BTE
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently working on a requirement to enhance the FBL3N report by populating values for fields such as LIFNR and EBELN.

During our analysis and after reviewing several SAP Community blogs, we found that BTE 00001650 is a viable solution for this enhancement. However, we have encountered the following issues:

  1. The standard structure RFPOSXEXT already contains the fields U_LIFNR and U_EBELN. But upon debugging BTE 00001650, we observed that these fields are not present in the internal tables I_POSTAB and E_POSTAB.

  2. To overcome this, we appended the required fields to the structures RFPOS and RFPOSX and then executed the report RFPOSXEXTEND. As a result, the structure RFPOSXEXT was updated correctly, and we were able to populate LIFNR and EBELN in the BTE logic, which were displayed as additional columns in the FBL3N output.

  3. Our main requirement is to populate these values specifically for documents with type 'RE', where currently these fields appear blank.

  4. We would like to confirm whether it is technically possible to populate values in the existing standard fields U_LIFNR and U_EBELN instead of creating and using new custom fields for this purpose.

We would appreciate your guidance or suggestions on how best to handle this scenario.

entry.title: Re: Key User Custom Fields in SAP S/4HANA SAP GUI UIs: How to control field properties (mandatory,..
entry.content: HI Juwin, in cases where the corresponding BAdI is missing please create a ticket or raise a requirement using the customer influence channel. And please note that I attached a txt file where you can see which GUI transactions provide such a BAdI so that you do not have to figure out that yourself. Best regards Georg

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Health Monitoring Integration Suite BTP Integrations and APIs
entry.content:
Hi,

We have activated Health Monitoring (Setup for SAP Integration Suite - API Management) but we would like to monitor SAP BTP APIs and Integrations. How can we do this? 

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM Health Monitoring Integration Suite BTP...
entry.content:
The KBA 3426195 discusses how to identify the products supported by SAP Cloud ALM, as well as the metrics offered by the various use cases (e.g. Health Monitoring). 

Currently SAP Integration Suite (API Management) is only supported by the Health Monitoring use case. The Health Monitoring Content page outlines that only a single metric is currently available: Certificate Validity.

Currently SAP Cloud ALM for Operations does not offer a use case to monitor APIs directly. Integrations are typically monitored using the Integration & Exception Monitoring use case. However, this use case does not yet support SAP Integration Suite (API Management).

If you wish to influence the future development of SAP Cloud ALM and provide direction to our Developers in relation to this topic, please use the options outlined in this KBA:
3391676 - SAP Continuous Influence for SAP Cloud ALM

entry.title: Service call module update date and create time into UTC format of MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss query
entry.content:
Hello experts.

I am needing to get the service call module update date & time (table OSCL) into a single column in the format of 'MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss' and then have it converted to UTC. Ultimately, I will be using this query in a Boyum P&D Report Action. I have seen posts before (but cannot find now) where the SQL function STUFF() was used but I know that each of those examples were for marketing document tables. Please direct me to those posts if I am mistaken.

The OSCL table does not record time with seconds, therefore the max number in characters/numbers in the time fields will be 4 (i.e., 1344 for 13:44, instead of ORDR's 134423 for 13:44:23).

I am able to perform the query below in MS SQL as well as the SAP B1 query editor when the time field has at least 3 characters (e.g., on or after 1am) but the FORMAT function fails when it is less than 3.

Is possible to query for the update date & time (or the create date & time) into a single column without having to perform a case statement to evaluate the length of time field (which could be from 1 - 4 characters long [2 for 00:02 and 932 for 09:32 and 1748 for 17:48])? 

FORMAT(CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), OSCL.UpdateDate, 101)+' '+FORMAT(OSCL.UpdateTime, '##:##')) AT TIME ZONE 'Eastern Standard Time' AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', 'MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss')

 Thank you in advance for any assistance you can provide.

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI patching
entry.content:
Hello,

  1. The latest patch already includes corrections from previous patches, so you need only to install the last one.
  2. You can refer to https://me.sap.com/notes/2312202/E to find SAP GUI versions available for download

Kind regards.

entry.title: Use Cases on SAP Cloud ALM itself
entry.content:
Good morning, 

We would like to request the activation of the features currently disabled in SAP Cloud ALM. The entry for "SAP Cloud ALM" itself has many use cases that are "not configured". We have attempted to activate them but have been unable to find the appropriate management application. Please provide guidance on how to ensure the ticketing functionality works properly. 

Thanks

Thanks in advance. 

 

Best regards. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Use Cases on SAP Cloud ALM itself
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM itself is given an entry in the Landscape Management app, because some of the Operations use cases have metrics that can be collected and reviewed in those apps. And like other products, those use cases and data collection can only be enabled from their specific applications (e.g. Health Monitoring). So you can follow the same steps outlined in KBA 3616000.

  1. Log onto SAP Cloud ALM.
  2. Select the relevant Operations app (e.g. Health Monitoring).
  3. Select the "scope" button on the top right of the page.
  4. Use the search pop-up to locate the "SAP Cloud ALM" service.
    • You may need to edit the filters so that all systems are displayed in the results, not just the ones already configured.
  5. Select the "SAP Cloud ALM" entry to add it to the scope and click "apply".
  6. Click the "Configuration" button.
  7. If the option is available in the use case, enable the data collection by setting the toggle to "ON".
  8. Click the "SAP Cloud ALM" text.
  9. Depending on the use case, enable data collection or configure filters for the categories supported for the selected system/service product type. 
  10. Data should start to appear in the operations app.

Please note, as per KBA 3616000, some use cases (e.g. Alert Notification) can only be enabled by enabling alerting or notifications (e-mail/chat) via an event in one of the operations use cases. The KBA has the full set of information on this, and other specific use cases.

entry.title: Re: Supplier Invoice approval workflow - Invoice currency
entry.content:
Hello @Gohar 

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, the Supplier Invoice Approval Workflow only allows threshold conditions in the company code currency. Group currency is not supported, and customer-specific enhancements like BAdIs (e.g., SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL) are unavailable in the public cloud.

 Recommended Workaround:

Use in-app extensibility via the Custom Fields and Logic app:

  • Create a custom field (e.g. “Group Currency Approval Level”) on the supplier invoice.
  • Implement custom logic to derive its value based on the invoice amount in group currency.
  • Use this custom field in your workflow conditions instead of relying on the invoice amount field.

 SAP Help References:

  • Manage Workflows for Supplier Invoices – SAP Help

This approach respects the restrictions of public cloud while still allowing you to incorporate group currency thresholds logically.

Thank you and kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: 🎉 Official Unofficial Pre-Event for hashtag#CodeConnect 2025 - Stammtisch
entry.content:
Per Volker Buzek's  social media post:

As tradition commands... we're kicking things off early with a relaxed Monday evening get-together! 🎊

📆 When?
🕔 Right after the UI5- and CAP-CodeJams - starting from 17:00 (5pm) on Monday, July 7

📍 Where?
The beautiful open-air setting of “19th Hole” ⛳ -
on the grounds of the golf club at St. Leon Rot (https://lnkd.in/e-nMkvCu)
🚶 Just a short walk from ROT03, the Code Connect / CodeJam venue (https://lnkd.in/ehetrVse)
🖼️ A few impressions: https://lnkd.in/eByEc5iv ("summer terrace")

🌤️ What to expect:
- gorgeous outdoor bar & terrace - and yes, we have the entire venue to ourselves 😎
- chance to wind down and talk story after CodeJams and prepare for the conference triple
- thanks to our CodeConnect sponsors for making this space possible 🙌
- à la carte food & drinks 🍔🍷 (pay your own way)

🎟️ Who’s invited?
Everyone! Whether you’re with UI5Con, re>≡CAP, or HANA Tech Con - come hang out! 💬👋

entry.title: CPQ 2.0 Quote Table On Cell Changed Event Triggers
entry.content:
Hello All, 

In my CPQ 2.0 environment, I have a Quote Table with a script attached to the On Cell Changed event in the Cell Events section. According to the CPQ 2.0 documentation, "In the Cell Events section, you activate the On Cell Changed event and attach a script that will be executed after users make a change in a quote table cell."

I am curious if there is a specific list of actions that trigger this event. So far, I have observed that pressing the TAB key and clicking outside the cell will trigger it. I am trying to understand what qualifies as "making a change in a quote table cell." For example, could pressing the ENTER key also trigger this event?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Mastering Complex SBPA Approvals : A Deep Dive into Wait Steps, Script Tasks, and API Integratio
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake  Thanks for your response. We can’t use branch step  here which would limit this approval process static.

The whole Idea is to make it dynamic based any number of Parallel approval required. Our approach indicates the dynamic retrieval of approvers and consider approved when all approval are done and if any one rejects reject the whole workflow.

Could you please advise on how I should proceed in this case?

entry.title: How to use Product migration object for Retail
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We noticed that the materials being uploaded with the app Migration Cockpit, Migration Object "Product", aren't being sent as Retail to the system, but rather as normal materials. Our question then is:

  • How do we use the Migration Object "Product" to upload Retail data to the system?

If it helps, we're currently running an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023, FPS 02. Thanks!

Best regards,
Data migration experts


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to use Product migration object for Retail
entry.content:
Dear experts,

It's advisable to always check the official documentation of any Migration Object you're handling, as it consistently has useful information about it. Considering your system version and release, the relevant documentation for your context would be the following one:

  • Product | SAP Help Portal

In it, you'll find that it leads to even further information about this Migration Object in regards to how to use it for retail purposes:

  • Product for SAP S/4HANA retail for merchandise management | SAP Help Portal

It'd be best if both documentations were fully reviewed by your team, so you can fully understand if the options provided by the Migration Object suits your business needs.

I hope this helps with your query!

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Update Eligibility Rule after Variable Pay form has b...

Will bring it to Product Team's attention again and share the influence request on Linkedin to see if we can get more votes for it.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Field List won't "Allow Docking"
entry.content:
I am using Crystal Reports 2020 with SP4 installed. The fix I found that worked for me, is the following: (with Crystal closed)

1. Go into your registry (after backing it up) to "Computer\HKEY_CURRENT_USER\SOFTWARE\SAP BusinessObjects\Suite XI 4.0\Crystal Reports\Formula Workshop\Formula\ToolBar-Bar1".
2. DockingStyle in my case was set to zero "0". Change this to "f000" (Hexadecimal) or "61440" (Decimal).
3. Open Crystal Reports 2020 again, and open (or create) a formula, and select the Function Tree icon. You should be able to select the "Allow Docking" (if it's not already selected) and snap it back into place.

Hope this helps! For reference, I checked the ToolBar-Bar2 and -Bar3 to compare to.

entry.title: Re: Location Entry Date

entry.title: Recruitment - Job Requisition Number of Vacanies
entry.content:
I have the following case raised from my user below.

We created a child requisition and closed off subsequently after hiring for the role. The data for "number of vacancies" shows incorrectly as "98 of 99 remaining" when its supposed to be "0 of 1 remaining". Usually when past child requisitions were closed they have shown as "0 out of 1 remaining" under the data tab of number of vacancies.

I suspect that when the user create the child requisition, all data were being copied down and has forgotten to update the vacancies before they send for approval. What can I do to update this number in the system now because reporting numbers are not reflecting correctly due to this.

entry.title: Handling CSV Data Deployment in CAP HDI Without Data Loss
entry.content:
Handling CSV Data Deployment in CAP HDI Without Data Loss

Introduction

In SAP CAP, deploying CSV data using .hdbtabledata files means the HDI container assumes full ownership of the data. As a result, any changes to the CSV file will overwrite the table content during the next deployment.

Background

Have you ever encountered a scenario where updating CSV data led to unexpected data loss? Here’s our experience:

In our hdi-content module, we maintained a UOM.csv (Unit of Measure) file, which is preloaded into the UOM table. This ensures that customers subscribing to our SaaS solution, SAP Omni Channel Promotional Pricing (OPPS), have immediate access to standard UOMs for defining product promotions. Since the UOM table is also exposed via CAP CDS views in the Fiori UI, customers can add their own entries as well.

The Issue

While working on a new feature that introduced another table with pre-delivered data, we discovered that any modification to the CSV file—such as adding or updating UOMs—could result in the loss of customer-maintained data in the UOM table. With many customers using our SaaS solution, this posed a significant risk of accidental data loss whenever the UOM.csv content was changed.

We needed a reliable solution to prevent customer data loss during deployments.

Exploring CAP Recommendations

According to the CAP documentation, you can use the include_filter option in .hdbtabledata to restrict which records are affected. This requires an additional column to distinguish between CSV data and user-generated data. In our case, we already had an origin column:

  • origin = '02': CSV data
  • origin = '10': Customer-created entries

However, even with include_filter, we found that customer data was still being lost, and only the CSV content remained after deployment.

The CAP troubleshooting guide references SAP Note 2922271, but its solution is tailored for @SAP/hdi-deploy and not directly applicable to @SAP/hdi-dynamic-deploy.

The Solution

With support from the HANA-DB-DI team, we identified a practical approach to address this challenge. We hope sharing this helps others building multitenant applications on CAP and HANA Cloud.

Deployment 1: Undeploy .hdbtabledata Without Deleting Data

First, set the HDI deployer's environment variable HDI_DEPLOY_OPTIONS in your MTA module properties to ensure the .hdbtabledata file is undeployed without deleting any data from the target table. Use the following configuration:

{
  "undeploy": [
    "src/gen/OPPC-UOM.hdbtabledata"
  ],
  "path-parameter": {
    "src/gen/OPPC-UOM.hdbtabledata:skip_data_deletion": "true"
  }
}

Then, proceed with the deployment and database upgrade. The logs below show this process:

2025-06-03T20:20:48.69+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [9d2219cebfa570a2]: Undeploying "src/gen/OPPC-UOM.hdbtabledata"...
2025-06-03T20:20:48.69+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [9d2219cebfa570a2]: Undeploying "src/gen/OPPC-UOM.hdbtabledata"... ok (0s 0ms)
2025-06-03T20:20:48.69+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [9d2219cebfa570a2]: Deploying "src/gen/OPPC.UOM.hdbtable$OPPC_UOM.validate"...
2025-06-03T20:20:48.69+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [9d2219cebfa570a2]: Expanded from "src/gen/OPPC.UOM.hdbtable"
2025-06-03T20:20:48.69+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [9d2219cebfa570a2]: Undeploying "src/gen/OPPC-UOM.hdbtabledata$0.expand"...
2025-06-03T20:20:48.69+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [9d2219cebfa570a2]: Expanded from "src/gen/OPPC-UOM.hdbtabledata"
2025-06-03T20:20:48.69+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [9d2219cebfa570a2]: The "skip_data_deletion" make parameter is set; no data will be deleted from the target table "OPPC_UOM"
2025-06-03T20:20:48.69+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [9d2219cebfa570a2]: Deploying "src/gen/OPPC.UOM.hdbtable$OPPC_UOM.validate"... ok (0s 11ms)
2025-06-03T20:20:48.69+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [9d2219cebfa570a2]: Undeploying "src/gen/OPPC-UOM.hdbtabledata$0.expand"... ok (0s 12ms)

Deployment 2: Deploy .hdbtabledata with include_filter

  1. Remove the HDI deployer's HDI_DEPLOY_OPTIONS environment variable used in the previous deployment.
  2. Update the .hdbtabledata file to include the include_filter option.
  3. Deploy and upgrade the database.

However, this deployment failed because the include_filter matched existing records in the table, as shown in the logs:

2025-06-03T20:31:52.57+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] ERR Error: com.sap.hana.di.tabledata: The "include_filter" definitions match with 4364 records that already exist in the "OPPC_UOM" table [8251521]
2025-06-03T20:31:52.57+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] ERR Error: com.sap.hana.di.tabledata: Deploying "src/gen/OPPC-UOM.hdbtabledata$0.expand"... failed [8212145]
2025-06-03T20:31:52.57+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] ERR Error: Worker 1 has encountered an error; all remaining jobs will be canceled [8214600]
2025-06-03T20:31:52.57+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] ERR Error: Processing work list... failed [8212102]
2025-06-03T20:31:52.57+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] ERR Error: Making... failed [8211605]
2025-06-03T20:31:52.57+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] ERR Error: Starting make in the container "679623F6772E4C3BA111AB4C1775754E" with 1 files to deploy, 0 files to undeploy... failed [8214168]

This deployment would only succeed if the database entries matching the CSV content were removed beforehand. In a multitenant application with many productive subscriptions, manually removing data for all tenants is not practical, and we lacked an automated solution for this process.

Possible Approaches

  • Automated Cleanup: If the origin values are consistently determined by application logic, you could develop an automated task to clean up these records. This cleanup would need to be performed as a separate deployment step before deploying the .hdbtabledata file, though this approach requires additional effort.
  • Alternative Approach: Instead, you can maintain new CSV content with a different origin value (e.g., origin='03'). This way, only the new CSV data is redeployed, and all existing data in the database table remains unchanged. Adjust the include_filter to target origin='03'.

The following logs show a successful deployment using this approach:

2025-06-03T20:36:18.52+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [be82fcfafc2dc1ee]: "src/gen/OPPC-UOM.hdbtabledata"
2025-06-03T20:36:18.52+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [be82fcfafc2dc1ee]: ]
.
.
.
2025-06-03T20:42:49.12+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [d9a3e16053ae1f81]: Undeploying "src/gen/OPPC-UOM.hdbtabledata$0.expand"...
2025-06-03T20:42:49.12+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [d9a3e16053ae1f81]: Expanded from "src/gen/OPPC-UOM.hdbtabledata"
2025-06-03T20:42:49.12+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [d9a3e16053ae1f81]: Deploying "src/gen/OPPC.UOM.hdbtable$OPPC_UOM.validate"...
2025-06-03T20:42:49.12+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [d9a3e16053ae1f81]: Expanded from "src/gen/OPPC.UOM.hdbtable"
2025-06-03T20:42:49.12+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [d9a3e16053ae1f81]: Deploying "src/gen/OPPC.UOM.hdbtable$OPPC_UOM.validate"... ok (0s 7ms)
2025-06-03T20:42:49.12+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [d9a3e16053ae1f81]: Undeploying "src/gen/OPPC-UOM.hdbtabledata$0.expand"... ok (0s 15ms)
2025-06-03T20:42:49.12+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [d9a3e16053ae1f81]: Undeploying "src/csv/OPPC-UOM.csv"...
2025-06-03T20:42:49.12+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [d9a3e16053ae1f81]: Undeploying "src/csv/OPPC-UOM.csv"... ok (0s 5ms)
2025-06-03T20:42:49.12+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [d9a3e16053ae1f81]: Deploying "src/csv/OPPC-UOM.csv"...
2025-06-03T20:42:49.12+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [d9a3e16053ae1f81]: Deploying "src/csv/OPPC-UOM.csv"... ok (0s 3ms)
2025-06-03T20:42:49.12+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [d9a3e16053ae1f81]: Deploying "src/gen/OPPC-UOM.hdbtabledata$0.expand"...
2025-06-03T20:42:49.12+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [d9a3e16053ae1f81]: Expanded from "src/gen/OPPC-UOM.hdbtabledata"
2025-06-03T20:42:49.12+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [d9a3e16053ae1f81]: Inserted 1 records of the data source file "OPPC-UOM.csv" into the target table "OPPC_UOM"
2025-06-03T20:42:49.12+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] OUT [d9a3e16053ae1f81]: Deploying "src/gen/OPPC-UOM.hdbtabledata$0.expand"... ok (0s 43ms)

References

  • Deployment Options in HDI
  • @sap/hdi-dynamic-deploy
  • CAP Troubleshooting: How do I keep existing data?
  • https://sap.stackenterprise.co/questions/73269 

Special Thanks

Special thanks to the HANA-DB-DI team members, particularly Pavel Sluzkin and Alexander Bunte, for their invaluable support and guidance!

entry.title: Re: Code Jam & SITSP2025 - A maior edição de todas!
entry.content: Será o maior, com certeza!

entry.title: Re: Reporting on completed workflows
entry.content: Hi, You can use canvas report to report on data that you need https://me.sap.com/notes/2274688 Report Canvas - Advanced reporting: Workflow Changes Activity log: The Workflow Changes Activity Log report provides details of the Workflow Request history, which is displayed on the activity log section from the Workflow UI. The following information is displayed: Who has initiated the workflow, who has approved a workflow step, who has rejected or sent back the workflow step. Furthermore, following details are displayed: If the workflow step was processed on behalf of somebody or the workflow step was escalated from one employee to another. Best regards, Elsa

entry.title: Re: Is there any equivalent app to J3RKKRD / J3RKKRS on S...
entry.content: Yes. I don't see this app in my system and check business catalog of these apps SAP_FIN_BC_GL_REPORTING_CN_PC for authorizaton. But it doesn't exist in my system

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Business Partner - Field Enhancement
entry.content:
Hi @Andi_M - Thank you for putting this together.  I am so excited to find this blog. This is very helpful. 

We are doing CVI synchronization pre-project in SAP ECC to convert Customer and Vendor to Business Partner. This is a mandatory step before starting the SAP ECC to S/4HANA upgrade project.

However, there are few custom fields in vendor master in SAP ECC. Should the enhancement to integrate the vendor master custom fields in BP be done in SAP ECC (before upgrade) or S/4HANA (after upgrade)? What is the recommended practice?

 I will really appreciate if you could you share your point of view.

Regards

MT

entry.title: Creation Date in Incoming Sales Orders - Flexible Analysis
entry.content:
Hello 

Trying to understand what creation date is being used in the Incoming Sales Orders - Flexible Analysis app. For example have an order that was created in December 24, changes/new lines created in June 25. Now in this app when putting in the Yr/Mo of Creation the order shows up in June25.

Is what other users are experiencing? Is the creation date based on the last creation date in the order and not the original creation date?

entry.title: BoM using 3rd party during manufacturing process
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I would be interested in hearing your solutions for an issue we have?

We have a BoM established which requires a 3rd party to perform a service as part of the manufacturing process.

Example:

Step 1. Raw steel frames are manufactured (with complete BoM)

Step 2. This is sent to Galvanisers to perform a service.

Step 3. Galvanised product is returned for completion of final stage of manufacturing. (BoM)

How would you capture the complete cost of the manufactured product (BoM for raw steel frame, plus galvanising, plus finishing BoM)?

Thank you all very much for your support

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Professional Services,...
entry.content:
Hello @Chuma,

Sorry for asking multiple questions.

I can't find "Assign Billing Method to Work Package". Is this a configuration? If so, please tell me the Activity ID (SSCUI ID).

Kind Regards,
Mamo_533

This status has persisted for more than 2 weeks.

I have sent a request email to TDD@SAP.COM, but there has been no progress.

entry.title: How to manage persons in 'Your Finance Contacts' card in SAP for Me page
entry.content:
Dear SAP team, we see that we have an administrator in SAP for Me> Finance & Legal > 'Your Finance Contacts' Card. who is not appropriate. We request that the user be removed from our SAP for me platform. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to manage persons in 'Your Finance Contacts' card...
entry.content:
You can find detail steps of how to change/create/transfer/delete your company Finance Contacts in below link:

3597947 - How to create and manage Purchase Order and/or Maintenance Responsible Contacts using 'Your Finance Contacts' card - SAP for Me - SAP for Me

You can find definition of SAP for Me> Finance & Legal > 'Your Finance Contacts' Card in below link:

3597879 - What is the 'Your Finance Contacts' card about? - SAP for Me - SAP for Me

You can also find more information about this card in link https://support.sap.com/content/s4m/help/finance/faq.html

entry.title: SAC New Features to try after migrating from NEO to Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Last update: 2025/06/04

As the landscape of data analytics continues to evolve, staying ahead of the curve is crucial for leveraging the full potential of your tools and resources. If you have been utilizing SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) on the SAP data center (Neo),  it's time to explore the transformative benefits of migrating to the non-SAP data center (Cloud Foundry). This blog is designed to summarize the exciting new features and enhancements that Cloud Foundry offers.

I will continue to update this blog as new features are released each quarter. Stay tuned and let’s start exploring!

 

Story

1. Scheduling and Publication

The Scheduling and Publication features in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) enable automated, customizable report distribution in various formats with targeted access control, enhancing collaboration and ensuring timely delivery of insights to relevant stakeholders. With this, you would be able to schedule a story with recurrence and distribute the same as a PDF over email to a number of different SAC and Non-SAC recipients. Want more, you can even include a customized message in the email per the schedule and as well attach a link to the view of the story in online mode which can be used to check the latest online copy of the story.

Please refer the help manual for details.

2. Video Data Story

The video data story feature in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) allows users to create dynamic, interactive presentations that combine data visualizations, text, and multimedia elements. This feature enhances storytelling by enabling users to convey insights more effectively and engage their audience with compelling narratives. In story view mode, you can select widgets to create a customized short video. You can then save, view and share it in SAP Analytics Cloud, and download it.

Please refer the help manual for details.

3. Hosting resource file on SAC (for both custom widgets and widget add-ons)

The Hosting resource file feature in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) allows users to upload and manage custom widgets and widget add-ons directly within the platform. This capability enhances customization and functionality, enabling users to tailor their analytics environment to better meet their specific needs.

Please refer the help manual for details.

 

Modeling

1. Currency Conversion Enhancements

Currency conversion tables let you take source data from different currencies in a model and convert it, either into a single currency for aggregation or into a set of currencies from a dimension. Tenants based on the Cloud Foundry environment benefit from the latest user experience improvements brought to the currency rate tables, with a redesigned toolbar and an improved Add Missing Rates dialog with a search functionality, as well as improved performance.

Please refer the help manual for details.

2. Unit Conversion Table

SAP Analytics Cloud provides a built-in standard unit conversion table that may be used as a technical reference and consumed in models and stories. You can edit the unit conversion table and maintain your own units and unit groups so that it suits your business needs. You can access the Standard Unit Table and Unit Description Table via the dedicated on the modeler's home screen.

Please refer the help manual for details.

3. Enhanced Experience of mapping data into a model

The new mapping experience on Cloud Foundry not only automatically pre-maps some parts of the data, but also provides new experience in date dimension mapping and attribute mapping.

Please refer the help manual for details.

4. Change data source of an import job

In the Data Management space, you can edit the data source and the query definition of an import job for models with measures if needed. This flexibility is helpful to adapt to possible changes on the external data source, or simply to repurpose an existing job for another data source without redoing all the upfront configuration.  

Please refer the help manual for details. 

 

Enterprise Planning

1. Predictive Planning capabilities

With Predictive planning, you can generate accurate forecasts on top of your actuals to accelerate your day-to-day planning activities.

Please refer the help manual for details.

2. Seamless Planning

As a modeler, when creating a model, you have the possibility to store your model's master data and fact data in SAP Analytics Cloud or SAP Datasphere. Storing your model's data in SAP Datasphere reduces your data footprint in SAP Analytics Cloud, and brings your planning data closer to your actual data, with no data replication or acquisition involved.

Please refer the help manual for details.

3. Data Upload Starter in Optimized story experience

If you’re using the optimized story experience and would like to allow users to upload their data as the first stage of planning, you can do so by inserting a data upload starter in your page.

Please refer the help manual for details.

 

AI for Planning and Analytics

1. Smart Predict - Predictive Scenarios

A Predictive Scenario helps address a business question requiring predictions. It is a workspace, where you create and compare predictive models to find the best one to bring the best predictions to address the business question. You can carry out Classification, Regression or Time Series Forecast with predictive scenarios. Please note that Smart predict is available on some of the Cloud Foundry tenants.

Please refer the help manual for details.

2. Just Ask natural language query

Powered by artificial intelligence, Just Ask enables you to search your data easily and efficiently using business terms you are familiar with. Simply ask your question using natural language, and Just Ask will instantly provide answers as simple charts and tables.

Please refer the help manual for details.

3. Analytical Insights in Joule

The analytical insights capability in Joule, powered by SAP Analytics Cloud, allows business users to explore their data and gain insights into your business, in a natural, conversational experience. Using familiar business terms, simply ask your question, and Joule will instantly provide answers as simple charts and metrics. Joule itself is not available in SAP Analytics Cloud, but instead your users ask questions to the Joule analytic insights feature from other SAP products that have enabled this capability.

Please refer the help manual for details.

 

Data Connection and System Administration

After migrating to Cloud Foundry, you will gain access to a group of new connectors and admin tools. Please click each feature to learn the details.

  1. SAP Integration Suite Open Connectors
  2. Live Connection to HANA Cloud using an “SAP HANA Cloud” Connection
  3. Live Data Connection to Google BigQuery
  4. Use “Username and Password” as the authentication method for live tunnel connection from SAC to S/4HANA
  5. Bring Your Own Key  

 

API Service

1. Managing users and teams via SCIM2 API

The SCIM2 endpoint is a SCIM 2.0 compliant endpoint that includes additional functionality not included in the SCIM endpoint. For example, you can search for teams, and get information on your identity provider (IDP), available schemas, and resource types.

Please check the help manual for the details.

2. Data Export/Import Service API

The Data Export/Import Service is an open API that allows you to retrieve/import fact and master data to SAP Analytics Cloud. The service offers a PULL based API data extraction API that helps with data integration from SAP Analytics Cloud to SAP Datasphere, SAP BW, SAP HANA, and other third-party tools. The API doesn't have a dedicated user-interface, and simply extracts data and information about providers. A provider corresponds to a planning model within a particular SAP Analytics Cloud system.

Please check the help manual for the details.

 

Summary

In conclusion, migrating from SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) on Neo to Cloud Foundry opens up a plethora of new features and enhancements designed to elevate your analytics and planning capabilities. Embrace these innovations to maximize the potential of your analytics environment and drive informed decision-making. Have fun with SAP Analytics Cloud!

Hi Aminziyat,

For the first link you can change the version to 2502 from the version selector to get the newer link or access the new link here. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/d9cc17d1aa404aee9bf2d10599c9a8d1.html?version=2502.500 

While it seems there isn't a direct way to include print queue details when doing mass printing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

Thanks,

Helen

entry.title: SF mobile app download and usage monitoring
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Is there a way to report on SF mobile app download and usage?

I know that in manage mobile user, we can export all mobile users, however, is there a way to know who is actively using the mobile application (usage)?

Many thanks!

Best Regards,

Gelo

entry.title: Re: New Webinar Series: Architecting Your SAP Business Data Cloud Journey – From Data to Intelligenc
entry.content: The registration confirmation message that comes back from registering has a calendar file with all the events. Each calendar entry has a link to the webinar broadcast.

entry.title: Re: Time sheet and overtime automatic submission and appr...
entry.content:
Issue:

  • Salary must be calculated on the 1st of each month.
  • Overtime (OT) for the end-of-month (e.g., 30th/31st) is often not approved in time for payroll.
  • Timesheets are used (basic EC Time Sheet, not Time Tracking), and rely on Monday manager approval.
  • This causes delays in including OT for the final 1-2 days of the month in payroll.

Ensure OT (especially for month-end dates) is approved and included automatically or faster, so payroll on the 1st includes all relevant earnings.

 Auto-Approval with Manager Notification

You can remove the workflow for overtime approvals and replace it with an automated approval, while still notifying the manager for visibility.

  1. Set Up Manager Notification (Optional)
    • Use a Business Rule on onSave or onChange of the Timesheet.
    • The rule can trigger a notification to the manager (without requiring their approval).
    • Use "Send Email Notification" in the rule and target the Manager field.
    • This ensures 30th and 31st OT gets picked up by payroll on the 1st.

 Use a one-step auto-escalation workflow:

  • Set manager approval to be auto-approved after 1 day.

entry.title: Leave of Absence management
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a customer that does most of their reporting based on the Position object, and they do not wish to use the standard Time Type Leave of Absence feature to maintain employees on LOAs.

Rather, they would like to use a workaround to move the employee to a position titled "Leave of Absence" so as to report as to who and how many employees are on LOA, and that the customer would like to understand if this would lead to any errors and if this solution is better in comparison to using the standard LOA time type.

SAP have indicated this is not best practice but the customer does not want to enable Time Off Time Types and change how they manage LOAs in the system currently.

Does anyone have any experience using a workaround for LOAs and whether this would be a suitable solution for the customer's needs?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Tips to assess and plan global e-invoicing solution implementation based on SAP Document and Rep
entry.content:
Nice article. And thanks a lot for sharing your professional experience. The DRC knowledge banks is still niche, and. you have clearly elaborated all possible scenarios and technical touch points. 

Wish you keep contributing as great as this article and many more like that for the community benefit. 

All my best wishes. 

Kind regards, 

Satish

entry.title: Sourcing and Procuremant
entry.content: When making procurement such as placing an order from a quotation within SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition, is there a report function that allows you to check the difference between the quotation amount and the order amount when ordering a certain item, as well as the discount rate?

entry.title: Re: IP30 doesn't reschedule maintenance plan as there is...

Hi Neeraj:

Got your feedback: users have to use IP10 reschedule maintenance plan one by one unless we develop a tool to mass reschedule.

Thank you and nice day

Yun

entry.title: Re: (-1) Critical cache refresh failure!
entry.content: Not opening

entry.title: Re: Quickly Generate and Deploy SAP Fiori Apps from ABAP Development Tools for Eclipse
entry.content: Yess , Super Easy

entry.title: Re: CoA is not printing automatically after Post Goods is...
entry.content: Make sure you have a valid output condition record in place and check that output requirement 001 is assigned to the output in the message schema.

entry.title: Group Reporting - Formula wizard in Review Booklet
entry.content:
Hi,

I was looking for some guidance on the formula wizard that is available in the Review Booklet when we try to add a calculation. 

We are looking for adding a calculated FS item for eg: Cost/ Revenue

Any suggestions or documentation reference will be of great help. 

Thanks,

Massarrat

entry.title: BTP App assignment in S4HC Custom Business Roles
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have few apps in BTP UI5 apps those need to be integrated with S4HC custom business roles. Can you provide help with process to archive this requirement.

Could you please provide assistance? Your prompt help would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks & Regards,

Veera Anasuri


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BTP App assignment in S4HC Custom Business Roles
entry.content:
If your apps are deployed on BTP, please kindly try to use "Custom Tiles" to create custom tiles.

Custom tiles can be used to access external applications.

And then you can assign the new tile to the business catalog where the new tile should be integrated by clicking Assign Catalogs in the custom tile details, or by launching the Custom Catalog Extensions app in the SAP Fiori Launchpad.

You can find more information about this in the Help Portal Page below:

Custom Tiles | SAP Help Portal

Custom Catalog Extensions | SAP Help Portal

Thanks and Best Regards,

Bell

entry.title: Re: Integrate SAP CRM WEB UI in BTP Build Work Zone
entry.content: Any update on this? Solved?

entry.title: Re: Certificate C_S4CPB_2502
entry.content: thank you RaghavaReddy. I have used the workaround, given by you, and I was able to perform the Task. Cheers, Dorota

entry.title: Re: DATA RELEASE FROM ACDOCA OF MULTIPLE CLIENTS TO ACDOCU.
entry.content:
Hi,

this is not possible. The 'Release UJ' task can only transfer the data from ACDOCA to ACDOCU when Accounting (ACDOCA) is in the same client as Group Reporting (ACDOCU).

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Configure outbound Scenario from S/4 to CPI
entry.content:
Hi Shashak,

Could you provide some additional context on what you are trying to achieve, so that we could provide a proper response to your question.

Thanks,
Prasanth

entry.title: Supporting the Cloud-Journey: A New Chapter for our SAP HANA Certification
entry.content:
As part of our SAP Certification for Operations Partners program, we offer a range of certifications that recognize partners delivering high-quality services for SAP® solutions and supporting customers on their digital transformation journeys. To reflect the growing importance of cloud technologies, we’ve updated our SAP HANA operations certification, now titled “SAP HANA Cloud and database operations.”

The cloud is no longer a destination but a continuous journey of optimization and innovation. To help our partners confidently lead their customers on this path, we’ve enhanced the certification to focus on the practical, day-to-day realities of SAP HANA Cloud deployments.

The updated certification places stronger emphasis on cloud-related content and highlights the core competencies required for:

  • Seamless migrations to SAP HANA Cloud
  • Operational management of SAP HANA Cloud instances, including performance monitoring and security

By demonstrating these skills, partners reinforce their role in confidently guiding customers through every phase of their cloud journey.

With its expanded scope, the certification now reflects a partner’s end-to-end expertise across the SAP HANA Cloud lifecycle - serving as a strong differentiator in delivering sustained value in the cloud.

Existing certified partners will benefit from these enhancements at no additional cost and will complete the extended content during their next re-certification audit.

 

SAP Certifications for Operations Partners - overview of certifications

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Information on the certification program for operations partners and an overview of all certified partners can be found in the SAP Operations Partner Guide.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP mock REST service
entry.content: I think all you describe is only valid for external ODATA services. Not for REST services.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hey everyone!
Really excited to be here it is awesome to have a space where we can share updates, post content, and connect with each other. Looking forward to some great conversations!

entry.title: Re: Difference between P.O.date and P.O.created date
entry.content: Is that possible to keep PO doc date same as PO creation date as per Award response.

entry.title: sap hana sd pending sales orders where dispatch not done order wise material wise qty and value rep
entry.content:
SAP HANA /SD 

 

pending order status 

using v_ra  backorders which does not have value

vl10c --> Sales order to delivery pending 

vl09 delivery order pending status 

appears not possible in Standard 

Acutal need is Sales order orderd qty, value Dev=livery Qty , value, Despatch qty value, pending order qty value material wise 

is there any possibility to get a query for this ?

entry.title: Unplanned depreciation calculation method
entry.content:
Dear Export,

I have an asset where usually do planned depreciation by every month. i have assigned Depreciation key as is day by day key. Unfortunately, business requirement is to post extra depreciation for that asset. 

So, i have posted Unplanned Depreciation by Transaction type 640 and when we refresh AW01N T.code against Asset planned depreciation. It got changed and next month planned value has been reduced.

How it is happened and is there any calculation method for next month planned depreciation.

entry.title: Can't see invoices in SAP for Me even if I have all authorizations
entry.content:
Can't see invoices under Finance & Legal -> Billing tab.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Can't see invoices in SAP for Me even if I have all a...
entry.content:
If you have questions or issues regarding the actual billing/invoices in the Billing application of SAP for Me (e.g. General invoice questions, missing invoices, too many invoices, invoice inaccuracies, questions on paid invoices, etc.), please email the SAP Cash Collection team directly at FinanceAR@sap.com (they do not work support cases).

In the email, provide your invoice/billing questions, your customer number/name and full details and screenshots of the invoice/invoice number.

Alternatively, you can also email the country-specific cash collection team found in the attachment added to this article.

3107749 - How to reach the SAP Cash Collection Team for billing questions - SAP for Me - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: Service call module update date and create time into...
entry.content:
Hi

try this

SELECT
  OSCL.UpdateDate,
  OSCL.UpdateTime,

  RIGHT('0000' + CAST(OSCL.UpdateTime AS VARCHAR), 4) AS ZeitString,
  
  
  CAST(
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), OSCL.UpdateDate, 120) + ' ' +
    LEFT(RIGHT('0000' + CAST(OSCL.UpdateTime AS VARCHAR), 4), 2) + ':' +
    RIGHT(RIGHT('0000' + CAST(OSCL.UpdateTime AS VARCHAR), 4), 2) + ':00'
    AS DATETIME
  ) AS DatumTime

FROM OSCL
WHERE CallID = 1

regards Lothar

entry.title: SF Onboarding → Celonis via API – only few tasks visible
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We're currently connecting SuccessFactors Onboarding to Celonis via API, but only get:

  • 2 tasks from “Data Collection”
  • 1 out of 6 “New Hire Tasks”

These show up in Celonis, but only partially – e.g., titles, comments, and content are missing. Other tasks (visible in SF under “Manage Data” with Process ID) don’t come through the API at all.

Question:
Has anyone managed to pull more tasks or fields? Any workarounds (OData, Integration Center, Reports etc.)?

Thanks for sharing your experience!

Best Regards,

Svetlana

SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding API OData

entry.title: Re: New Pipeline for Cloud Integration features with version 1.0.11
entry.content: I am approaching the pipeline and therefore I am not a super expert. I have a doubt: when I access for Partner Altervative, the values ​​to use for recipient URL or for other parameters are those contained in the "string" tab ?. Do the groovy provided by the templates in Business SAP HUB reason in this way? In general, there is a guideline of which values ​​to insert in each field?. Example: Agency: sender system, Schema: Sender interface, ID: Namespace, etc..

entry.title: Lack of API Support for Invoice Cancellation in SAP Convergent Invoicing
entry.content:
We are currently attempting to cancel invoices in Convergent Invoicing directly from the front-end system. However, we've discovered that SAP does not provide any standard APIs to support this functionality. This is quite surprising, considering that invoice cancellation is a fundamental requirement in most billing scenarios.

Due to the absence of standard APIs, we are now exploring the development of a custom API. However, we’ve encountered another challenge: the standard function modules (FMs) required for invoice cancellation are not released for customer use. As a result, there's effectively no supported way to perform invoice cancellations outside of using transaction codes or Fiori applications.

This raises a significant concern. If we proceed with a custom solution using non-released FMs, we risk losing SAP support in the event of issues—even if those issues originate from standard SAP code. The typical response from SAP in such cases is that the FM is not released and, therefore, not supported.

Given that no alternative standard option is provided for such a basic requirement, we are looking for guidance on how this scenario can be handled while still remaining within SAP's support boundaries. Is there a recommended or supported approach to achieve invoice cancellation programmatically, or any way to escalate this gap for consideration?

entry.title: Re: Final settlement is not considering the previous sett...
entry.content: I have checked all the configuration mentioned above nothing is wrong. In one condition contract, i could see RES2 getting determined in one settlement document and not in another settlement document. Also, RES2 got determined only in the case where the Sold to mentioned in the Business volume criteria is same as Bill to party in Settlement Document. Kindly provide your inputs.
